Bash(powershell -Command "
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing
\\$screen = [System.Windows.Forms.Screen]::PrimaryScreen.Bounds
\\$bitmap = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\(\\$screen.Width, \\$screen.Height\)
\\$graphics = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\(\\$bitmap\)
\\$graphics.CopyFromScreen\(\\$screen.Location, [System.Drawing.Point]::Empty, \\$screen.Size\)
\\$bitmap.Save\('C:\\temp\\screen272.png'\)
\\$graphics.Dispose\(\)
\\$bitmap.Dispose\(\)
Write-Host 'saved'
")

Bash(powershell -Command "
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing
\\$chrome = Get-Process chrome -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object {!\\$_.MainWindowTitle.Equals\(''\)} | Select-Object -First 1
if \(\\$chrome\) {
    [System.Windows.Forms.SetForegroundWindow]\(\\$chrome.MainWindowHandle\) | Out-Null
    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 300
    [System.Windows.Forms.SendKeys]::SendWait\('{F5}'\)
    Start-Sleep -Seconds 5
}
\\$screen = [System.Windows.Forms.Screen]::PrimaryScreen.Bounds
\\$bitmap = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\(\\$screen.Width, \\$screen.Height\)
\\$graphics = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\(\\$bitmap\)
\\$graphics.CopyFromScreen\(\\$screen.Location, [System.Drawing.Point]::Empty, \\$screen.Size\)
\\$bitmap.Save\('C:\\temp\\screen274.png'\)
\\$graphics.Dispose\(\); \\$bitmap.Dispose\(\)
Write-Host done
")
